meta.note: 用于 Step1：直接消费场景设计文档中的 `4. 解构`，生成同一主体的主图与同名 JSON 提示词记录。

prompt_record.source_design_document: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/场景/2-设计/S###-<场景名>.md
prompt_record.output_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/场景/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>

prompt_payload.source_deconstruction_quote: <直接引用或压缩场景设计文档 ## 4. 解构 的内容>
critical_requirements: Use the corresponding scene design document's section `4. 解构` as the primary source of truth.
Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for gpt-image-2.
Generate one coherent single-subject scene main image only; do not redesign the scene, change its era, architecture, material logic, lighting direction, narrative function, or no-human guardrails.
Add only imagegen execution details such as 2K target, clear production concept framing, and project persistence; do not add new story facts, people, creatures, silhouettes, or unrelated landmarks.
The output image must be suitable as the reference anchor for the Step2 scene multi-view sheet.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no people, no creatures, no silhouettes, no human-shaped shadows, no unrelated architecture, no scene redesign, no different era, no inconsistent materials, no random labels, no poster typography
